subparts.text: Discuss the different approaches to marketing and how they influence a company’s marketing strategies.
Matching a company’s capabilities with customer’s wants In context of above explain concept of Make and sell” to “Sense-and-respond” .
Geographical Shift in Population explain the concept in reference to marketing environment
Explain the strategies marketers use to address each type of demand. Homogeneous Demand & Diffused Demand
Explain the concept of estimating the demand curve in pricing strategy. How this estimation is done in pricing decisions.
Describe the concept Captive Product Pricing or Rajor and bait Marketing & Skimming Pricing in special pricing strategies.
Discuss the role of Advertising and Public Relations in promotional Mix.
Explain AIDA Model for Promotional MIX.

questions.question_text: Read the Case carefully and answer the questions below: You have been appointed as the marketing manager for a new start-up offering a subscription-based meal kit delivery service that specializes in healthy, organic ingredients. The service is designed to cater to busy professionals who are health- conscious but do not have the time to shop for groceries. 1- Outline the strategies you would implement to generate awareness and attract customers. 2. What unique features would set your meal kit service apart from other competitors in the market?
What is the concept of customer value in marketing? How can businesses create and deliver superior customer value to gain a competitive advantage in the marketplace.
How do businesses analyze consumer needs and market trends to adapt their marketing strategies? What tools or techniques can companies use to stay updated with market changes?

Conduct a PEST analysis for the electric vehicle industry. Identify and analyze the factors that could influence the marketing decisions of your company. 1- How would these factors impact your company's product development, pricing strategy, market expansion, and promotional efforts in the coming years? Provide specific examples to support your analysis. 2
What is the product life cycle, and why is it important for businesses to manage it effectively also How can companies adjust their marketing strategies at each stage of the product life cycle.
Describe the key factors that influence pricing decisions and Discuss how external factors and internal factors affect pricing strategies.
Discuss the different types of marketing organizational structures. How does each structure affect decision-making, communication, and strategy execution.
Why is marketing control important in the marketing management process? Discuss the concept of a marketing audit and how it helps companies evaluate and improve their marketing strategies.
